name: vps-ninja
description: Deploy and manage applications on VPS servers with Dokploy. Use when the user wants to: set up a new VPS server, deploy a project from GitHub, manage domains/DNS, create databases, check server status, view logs, or remove deployed projects. Also use when the user mentions re-deploying, checking deploy status, adding environment variables, or troubleshooting a deployed app. Also triggers when users say things like "put this on my server", "I need hosting", "make this accessible online", "my site is down", "set up CI/CD for deployment", or anything related to getting code running on a remote server. Triggers on: VPS, deploy, server setup, Dokploy, hosting, domain, DNS, redeploy, server status, deploy logs, "put online", "host this", "site down", CI/CD.
